calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Asnwers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Santions;
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtna Nd Mtn For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Sep-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert D. Resner, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Marco A. Uicab
Mark Rennie, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Courtyard Montgomery

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Marco A. Uicab's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is denied. No other matters are properly before the court at this time. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
